title: sideritis endressii subsp. provincialis
intro: Sideritis endressii subsp. provincialis, also known as mountain tea or alpine tea, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Sideritis and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of mountain tea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Sideritis endressii subsp. provincialis can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make tinctures and infusions.
